description.unified: Deals ??? M.DMG by shooting a [bouncing projectile->attack] which bounces [4->3] times starting from the nearest enemy. The [farther->further] the enemy, the more DMG [increases by up to 100%->inflicted].

Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies [furthest away in a small range->random enemy and surrounding enemies], and stuns them for [1.8 sec->3 sec]. The [farther->further] the enemy, the more DMG [increases by up to 200%->they will take].

Deals ??? M.DMG to [target enemies in range->enemies within range], [knocks them back for 1.8 sec, and->] reduces target's Crit Chance by 100% for 7 sec. [(removed) Damage increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.]

[When inflicted by CC, dispels negative effects from self and attacks the farthest enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG and knocking them down for 1.2 sec, and increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6 sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is->When inflicted by CC, dispels negative effects from self and attacks the farthest enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG and knocking it away for 2 sec].

dark.unified: Enemies hit are stunned for [1.2->2] sec.

light.unified: In exchange for [2000->2] additional Mana Cost, attacks [random->] enemies [hit is increased by 2->3 times].
Reduces ACC of hit enemies by [200->150] for 7 sec.

dark.unified: In exchange for [damage dealt is increased by 100%->1 additional Mana Cost], [If there is only 1 enemy->] knock back the enemy [over a long distance->].
